intent: Log in as standard_user and complete a checkout. The order should confirm.
step: Click Finish and confirm the order success page appears
observed_behavior: After Finish, the page showed a green checkmark and the text 'Thank you for your order!' with 'Your order has been dispatched...'. I expected the words 'Order Confirmed'.
agent_reasoning: The confirmation wording does not match 'Order Confirmed', so I am not sure the order went through.
dom_excerpt:
Thank you for your order!

Your order has been dispatched...
